<<vegetable>> The principles of blockchain technology are based on a decentralized ledger that records transactions across a network of computers. <<vegetable>> Each transaction is verified and added to the ledger in a way that ensures transparency and security. <<vegetable>> The use of cryptography ensures that data is immutable and tamper-proof. <<vegetable>> The system is designed to prevent fraud and unauthorized access.  

<<vegetable>> - <<actor>> The blockchain uses a consensus mechanism to validate transactions, ensuring all participants agree on the state of the ledger. <<vegetable>> - <<bottom>> The data is stored in blocks, which are linked together in a chain. <<vegetable>> - <<pack>> Each block contains a cryptographic hash of the previous block, making it difficult to alter data.  

That's all I have to say.
